data.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — All 4 AC verifies pass. test-model-config-integration.sh created with 4 tests covering enrich-file-impact.sh (dry-run uses config model ID), semantic-conflict-check.py (exit nonzero when haiku absent, exit 0 on empty diff with config), generate-skill-eval.sh (generated YAML uses config model ID + yaml.safe_load validity). .test-index updated with 3 entries + [test-model-config-integration] RED marker. 7 PASS / 4 FAIL (expected RED).
